title: spiraea hirsuta var. rotundifolia
intro: Spiraea hirsuta var. rotundifolia, also known as Round-leaved or Hairy Meadowsweet, is a perennial herb belonging to the rose family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Spiraea hirsuta var. rotundifolia include its potential to alleviate digestive problems, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as colds and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
